name: camtraffic
description: CamTraffic — AI traffic sign detection & enforcement (Cambodia)

scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -k -n user,admin -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:frontends: npm install --prefix frontend-user && npm install --prefix frontend-admin
